race.description: Budget Car And Truck Hire (Bm62) Hcp
race.comment: CENTU CAVADDI (8) gets another chance third-up. He made good improvement last start at Seymour when just nosed out nearer the inside as the winner came very wide. Up an extra 100m again will suit and he can run another strong race at each-way odds. TERRORTORIAN (2) won two on the bounce prior to last start when struggling in much tougher company on heavy ground at Flemington. This suits much better and he'll take beating. DRECK (12) is coming off a nice maiden win at short odds at Ballarat and can continue to progress with more improvement to come. THE MEAN FIDDLER (9) struggled fresh at Swan Hill but can strip fitter and up in trip will suit much better.
